package.name: abb_crb15000_gazebo
package.description: Gazebo Sim (headless) bringup for the ABB CRB 15000 (GoFa-5/0.95). Provides a URDF with proper inertias (sourced from MerlinLaboratory/ABB_omnicore_ros_driver, BSD), ros2_control configuration with gz_ros2_control/GazeboSimSystem hardware interface, controllers + launch for offline Phantom-IK closed-loop testing.
